b83b7af4e162.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
b83b7af4e162.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
b83b7af4e162.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

71e905066f1e.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
71e905066f1e.description: At 3.8/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
71e905066f1e.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

e6ee55fd8ed3.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
e6ee55fd8ed3.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

daa3a5b37f3b.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
daa3a5b37f3b.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
daa3a5b37f3b.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

925cd0598b40.title: Ranked #4 of 6 locally — peers are ahead
925cd0598b40.description: At percentile 40.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.
